query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "multi-turn reflective masking elicits reasoning in mask diffusion mode" linguistics
rationale: The paper investigates LLM personality consistency and self-knowledge, which is a distinct construct from the user's specific focus on "Multi-Turn Reflective Masking" and "Reasoning in Mask Diffusion Mode." While both involve LLM behavior, the candidate paper does not measure the same mechanism (reflective masking), the same variable (reasoning elicitation via diffusion), or the same domain (linguistic masking techniques), and thus fails to meet any of the inclusion criteria (a-f) for a literatu
